title: leontodon montanus subsp. montaniformis
intro: Leontodon montanus subsp. montaniformis, a sub-species of the mountain hawk's beard plant, is a flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is known to offer various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Leontodon montanus subsp. montaniformis can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
